positive: A whimsical and stylized depiction of a glowing nebula cradling a detailed silhouette of a majestic lion and an elegant soaring crane. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau with elements of celestial mythology and Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal teal, and vibrant gold accents, suggesting depth and cosmic mystery. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, utilizing negative space effectively for apparel printing. The central subject must be crisp and instantly recognizable, with clean linework and strong contrast against the background void. Volumetric lighting and perfect gradient rendering are required. High detail, vector art quality, clean edges, print-ready.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low contrast, jpeg artifacts
